assertions.description: The RS485iso.kicad_sch contains U11 (ISO3082DW, lib_id Interface_UART:ISO3082DW), which is an isolated RS485 transceiver. The bus_analysis reports can=[], i2c=[], spi=[], uart=[] — no RS485 interface is detected. The design_observations only flags 4 single-pin nets (POCI, REN, DEN, PICO — which are the RS485 DE/RE control and data pins) but does not synthesize them into an RS485 bus detection. The analyzer should recognize the ISO3082DW lib_id or the A/B differential pair as RS485.
